feat.name: Apprentice Sea Witch
feat.text: You're familiar with the basic spells that most educated merfolk know. Once per day, you can cast either *create water* or *hydraulic push* as a 1st-rank primal innate spell. Each time you cast *create water*, you choose if you create fresh water or salt water.

traits.name: Merfolk
traits.text: These aquatic humanoids have an upper body similar to a human and a lower body similar to a fish.
